en_title: God of War Laufey Isn't a Prequel — Here's Why
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》并非前传，圣莫妮卡工作室详解原因
subtitle: 死后世界新冒险
opus_summary: 在索尼State of Play上公布的《战神：劳菲》并非前传，而是与《战神》（2018）和《诸神黄昏》时间线平行的故事，讲述已故的劳菲在神界死后世界的冒险。游戏总监Ariel Lawrence和创意总监Cory Barlog向IGN解释，他们曾考虑前传，但认为从劳菲死后开始探索宇宙未知领域更有趣。Barlog透露早在2018年就开始铺垫宇宙扩展的叙事节拍，而奥丁对死后世界的恐惧正是探索的契机。劳菲的死亡成为重生故事的导火索，玩家将与她一同踏入这个超越希腊和北欧神话的广阔世界。

paragraphs.en: By now you’ve probably seen the 20-minute gameplay reveal of God of War Laufey , the next game in the God of War franchise, fresh from Sony’s State of Play showcase. The game stars Faye, who died in 2018’s God of War. You’d think, then, that God Of War Laufey would be a prequel. But it isn’t. Instead, the developers at Sony Santa Monica decided to tell a story that runs parallel to the timeline of 2018 and Ragnarok, depicting Faye’s journey through the afterlife.
paragraphs.cn: 现在你大概已经看过了索尼State of Play上公布的《战神》系列新作《战神：劳菲》的20分钟实机演示。游戏主角是2018年《战神》中已故的劳菲。你可能会以为《战神：劳菲》是一部前传，但事实并非如此。相反，索尼圣莫妮卡工作室的开发者们决定讲述一个与2018年《战神》和《诸神黄昏》时间线平行的故事，描绘劳菲在死后世界的旅程。

paragraphs.en: So, why did Sony Santa Monica decide against doing a prequel? In an interview with IGN ahead of the State of Play reveal, which you can check out in full in the video below, game director Ariel Lawrence and Santa Monica Studio Head of Creative, Cory Barlog, revealed they had talked about a prequel, but felt picking things up after Faye’s death was a much more interesting proposition because it opened up the God of War universe in ways players don’t yet fully understand.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，为什么圣莫妮卡工作室决定不做前传呢？在State of Play公布前接受IGN采访时（完整内容见下方视频），游戏总监Ariel Lawrence和圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监Cory Barlog透露，他们确实讨论过前传，但认为从劳菲死后开始讲述故事是一个更有趣的选择，因为这能以玩家尚未完全理解的方式拓展《战神》宇宙。

paragraphs.en: “It was super important for us to start on the same page as the players,” Lawrence said. “And where we left Faye was that she was dead. And we talked about a prequel and what we would have told a story about. And while those events are still quite interesting, it just felt like what we really wanted to start with was right where we left off and drive that story forward from Faye’s perspective, and then really put Faye and players in the same spot about exploring this new world.”
paragraphs.cn: Lawrence表示：「对我们来说，与玩家站在同一起跑线上至关重要。而劳菲的结局就是死亡。我们讨论过前传以及可以讲述的故事。虽然那些事件仍然很有趣，但我们真正想做的是从我们离开的地方开始，从劳菲的视角推动故事发展，让劳菲和玩家一起探索这个新世界。」

paragraphs.en: “Even back in 2018, we started building all this,” Barlog added. “We were setting tiny little narrative beats that were going to start to structurally support this growth of the universe. And going into Ragarok and having Odin's thrust be this fear: ‘What happens when I die? I know what happens to everybody else, I set it all up, but what happens to gods when they die?’ And that sort of question, which remained unanswered, was that sort of question out to the audience, that idea of, we are going to explore this.
paragraphs.cn: Barlog补充道：「早在2018年，我们就开始构建这一切。我们埋下了微小的叙事节拍，为宇宙的扩展提供结构支撑。到了《诸神黄昏》，奥丁的核心恐惧是：『我死后会怎样？我知道其他人的结局，我安排好了一切，但神死后会怎样？』这个未解之谜被抛给了玩家，而我们的想法就是去探索它。」

paragraphs.en: “And one of the most famous deaths inside of this world is the inciting incident for this rebirth. And I think that is the perfect character for that perfect time to then start to say, there is more to this world than you know, beyond what you knew from the Greek era, beyond what you knew from where we were in Norse. But it just goes so much further beyond it. And it all connects to each other. It all influences each other. And the idea of being able to see her reborn in this new world and have to kind of get those awkward first steps together.”
paragraphs.cn: 「而这个世界中最著名的死亡之一，正是这次重生的导火索。我认为，在完美的时机用这个完美的角色来宣告：这个世界远比你想象的广阔，超越你所知的希腊时代，超越我们所在的北欧领域。它远不止于此。一切相互关联，相互影响。能够看到她在这个新世界中重生，并一起迈出那些笨拙的第一步，这个想法太棒了。」

paragraphs.en: God of War fans are already trying to work out if Faye’s journey through the afterlife of the gods is referenced in either the 2018 game or Ragnarok, or if she might have played a part in any unexplained events that occurred in either game from within Everywhen. Barlog’s comments suggest this is all part of some storytelling masterplan, so it will be interesting to see how it fits together.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神》粉丝们已经在试图弄清楚，劳菲在神界死后世界的旅程是否在2018年《战神》或《诸神黄昏》中被提及过，或者她是否在「万时之境」中参与了这两部游戏中某些未解释的事件。Barlog的评论暗示这一切都是某个宏大叙事计划的一部分，因此看看它们如何串联起来将会很有趣。

paragraphs.en: We’ve got plenty more on God of War Laufey, including a roundup of reaction to the gameplay from across the internet (the decision not to do a prequel seems to be going down well), and an explainer on Faye herself if you need a catch-up on her story. And here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 我们还有更多关于《战神：劳菲》的内容，包括来自互联网的实机演示反应汇总（不做前传的决定似乎反响不错），以及关于劳菲本人的介绍，方便你回顾她的故事。此外，这里还有2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容，让你了解PlayStation的储备阵容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
